description: Interactive demonstration of snackbar notifications with different types (default, success, danger, warning) and stacking functionality.

title: Tables Examples | PHP Proxy Hunter
description: Comprehensive DataTable examples showcase including default, sorting, search, and advanced filtering options with pagination support.

title: Advanced Table | PHP Proxy Hunter
description: Advanced DataTable featuring column-based search filters, dynamic table rendering, sorting, pagination, and comprehensive filtering with per-column search inputs.

title: Default Table | PHP Proxy Hunter
description: Basic DataTable with built-in sorting, pagination (5, 10, 15, 20 entries per page), and search functionality using simple-datatables library.

title: Search Table | PHP Proxy Hunter
description: DataTable with real-time search functionality across all columns to filter company data with sorting and pagination support.

title: Sorting Table | PHP Proxy Hunter
description: DataTable with column header sorting capabilities - click headers to sort data in ascending or descending order without search functionality.
